v066_self_map.key_finding: Nova has operational self-awareness across brain, memory, learning, and robot systems

v069_self_scripting.key_finding: Nova can plan, write, test, and repair scripts in a safe sandbox

v070_robot_sim_bridge.key_finding: Nova can plan and simulate robot commands, but no real hardware commands were sent

v071_robot_safety_spine.key_finding: Safety spine blocks real movement until emergency stop, sensors, zone, config, simulation, and owner approval are all satisfied

blockers_for_physical_movement: Real hardware config file not present
Manual owner approval not yet obtained
next_safe_upgrade: v072 — Body Sensor Registry (define and register physical sensor interfaces)
safety_statement: Nova Creature can plan robot commands and simulate them, but real robot movement is not active yet. The safety spine blocks physical movement until emergency stop, sensors, zone boundaries, configuration, simulation, and owner approval are all proven.
